vision_profile.current_state: Aarav is a Backend Engineer with 6 years of experience, proficient in Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, and Redis, currently earning 145,000 monthly.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest fear is that weak system design depth, particularly in distributed systems, Kafka, and AWS deployment patterns, will prevent him from securing a senior role and owning larger engineering decisions.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Aarav aims to be a Senior Backend Engineer, earning 230,000 monthly, capable of designing and architecting complex distributed systems, and leading significant technical decisions.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to move beyond executing assigned tickets and take ownership of larger engineering decisions, driving architectural direction and impact.

milestones.identity_statement: Build a robust understanding of core system design principles and the fundamentals of distributed systems to lay the groundwork for senior engineering.

modules.title: Core System Design Principles
modules.description: Master the essential concepts of building scalable, available, and reliable backend systems.

skills.title: Scalability & Load Balancing
skills.description: Understand horizontal vs. vertical scaling, various load balancing algorithms, and their impact on system performance.

video.title: Introduction to Scalability and Load Balancers

modules.title: Distributed Systems Fundamentals
modules.description: Dive into the core challenges and solutions in building robust distributed systems.

skills.description: Understand the trade-offs between Consistency, Availability, and Partition Tolerance, and various consistency models (strong, eventual).

scenario.title: Choosing a Consistency Model for a Global Social Media Feed

skills.title: Distributed Transactions & Concurrency

skills.description: Implement robust error handling by understanding idempotent operations and effective retry mechanisms.

scenario.title: Ensuring Exactly-Once Processing for a Financial Transaction

modules.title: Performance Optimization & Monitoring Basics
modules.description: Learn initial strategies for optimizing system performance and setting up basic monitoring.

scenario.title: Implementing a Rate Limiter for a Public API

skills.title: Caching Strategies

scenario.title: Designing a Caching Layer for a News Feed Service

skills.title: Basic Monitoring & Alerting
skills.description: Set up fundamental metrics, logging, and alerting to understand system health and react to issues proactively.

milestones.identity_label: Deep Dive into Distributed Messaging & Data
